title: Penalty
doc_html:
§1458.  Penalty

Whoever violates any of the provisions of this Chapter shall be fined not more than two thousand dollars or imprisoned not more than five years, or both.

Acts 1978, No. 514, §1; Acts 2003, No. 713, §1.
